generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that investing in civil defense preparedness actually strengthens our national security while protecting our liberties? Many of our neighbors are already taking steps to ensure their families are safe. It's time we all do our part to keep America secure without sacrificing our freedoms. #CommunityPreparedness #NationalSecurity
